variants.creative_direction: Ebony grand piano anchors a dusky salon bathed in chandelier warmth. Deep burgundy velvet and gold filigree blur softly behind. Candlelight skims the piano's lacquered lid, creating liquid reflections. No hard shadows — only opulent, diffused glow.

flux_prompt.scene: Dissolving fields of deep burgundy and molten amber, bleeding into obsidian darkness at the edges, warmth radiating from an invisible center
flux_prompt.style: Hasselblad X2D 100C, 80mm f/2.8, long exposure color field
flux_prompt.lighting: Radial warm bloom at center fading to near-black crimson periphery, soft aureate halos, no hard terminator lines
flux_prompt.mood: opulent, hushed, reverent, timeless, smoldering
flux_prompt.background: Abstract deep-field gradient — obsidian to burgundy to gold — smooth and depthless, ideal for compositing a dark lacquered instrument
flux_prompt.composition: Radial luminous bloom centered slightly above midpoint, dissolving outward into rich vignette darkness

camera.angle: Straight-on, perfectly level, infinity focus on the light field
camera.depth_of_field: Entirely soft — no focal plane, pure luminous abstraction throughout

variants.scene_direction_seed: grand private salon or ballroom at dusk, wide bokeh of warm candlelight and chandeliers reflected across a deep dark parquet floor, rich burgundy and gold tones throughout, scattered soft light sources creating an opulent glow, old world elegance, no hard shadows

variants.creative_direction: Ebony grand piano emerges from a vast, dark concert hall shot at floor level. House and rig lights dissolve into deep bokeh. Atmospheric haze, polished black stage floor, monumental depth. Reverential, epic, crimson-tinged shadow.

flux_prompt.scene: Vast dissolving light fields suspended in deep darkness, atmospheric haze catching diffused warm and crimson luminescence, infinite depth
flux_prompt.style: Hasselblad X2D 100C, 110mm f/2.8
flux_prompt.lighting: Scattered rig lights bloom into wide bokeh halos, deep crimson gradients bleeding into near-black, gossamer haze veiling distant warm glows
flux_prompt.mood: reverential, monumental, epic, hushed, luminous darkness
flux_prompt.background: Deep color-field darkness with suspended crimson and amber light blooms, rich tonal gradients fading to absolute black at edges
flux_prompt.composition: Horizontal gradient bands of diffused light rising from deep black base, radial bloom centrally placed, vignette pulling hard to edges

camera.angle: Extreme low angle, floor-level perspective tilted slightly upward
camera.depth_of_field: Razor-thin foreground, entire mid and background dissolving into wide creamy bokeh
